productDisplayName: UCB Men's Polo Neck T-shirt In Solid Heavy Wash Black T-shirt
description: CompositionBlack polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a stone-wash look, ribbed collar and velvetty in-seam, buttoned rugged chest placket, shoulder panels, short sleeves with ribbed hems, slits at shirt side ends and embroidered ucb on left chestFittingComfortWash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees Use mild detergent Do not tumble dry Do not wring Do not bleach Do not dry clean Do not dry in direct sunlight Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Absolutely stylish with a stone-washed look, this black polo neck t-shirt from the united colors of benetton speaks volumes of your sense of heightened style. The rugged placket on the chest coupled with the thickly embroidered UCB lettering on the left chest enhances that casual fashionista in you. The ribbed sleeve hems contour your well-toned arms perfectly, while the slits at the shirt ends offer a comfortable Fit. Team this with jeans and lifestyle sportswear for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
